## Source: ossf-package-analysis (2ce839cee3a269944cf305057d6746895eb15dec90dbbe6dd48210569287082d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-webhooks-core' @ 1.7.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
